prd.user_story: As a developer, I want to: Which GitHub repository (org/repo format) is the authoritative source of truth for the Go module `go.etcd.io/etcd/client/v3`? Provide evidence by identifying the exact file path that contains the `module go.etcd.io/etcd/client/v3` declaration.
constraints: Provide specific file paths and repository names in your answer.
prd.success_definition: Agent successfully identifies relevant files and symbols across all repos in the multi-org-go fixture.
